title: veridict plan report
description: JSON output of `veridict plan`. Report-only (no overall verdict), same input as `matrix` - recommends which pairs would most benefit from more trials to narrow their Elo-difference CI to --min-elo half-width, ranked most-uncertain first.

schema_version.description: Stays 1 across additive changes; bumps only when a field is removed or renamed.

min_elo.description: The Elo gap worth being able to detect - recommendations narrow each pair's CI toward this half-width.

recommendations.description: Disconnected/no-CI pairs first, then most-uncertain-first (largest estimated_additional_trials), ties broken by (row, col).

current_ci_half_width.description: null when no CI exists yet to narrow at all (disconnected, or a fragile-bridge direct/inferred cell) - not when the CI is merely wide.

estimated_additional_trials.description: 0 when the current CI already meets min_elo. null alongside a non-null note for the same cells current_ci_half_width is null for.

note.description: Explains why no estimate is possible yet; null whenever estimated_additional_trials is non-null.
